_all.en: The heatbed temperature is abnormal; the sensor may have an open circuit.
_all.fr: La température du plateau est anormale, le circuit de mesure est peut être interrompu.

A1.en: Please check if the filament is coming out of the nozzle. If not, gently push the material and try to extrude again.

_all.en: Please check if the filament is coming out of the nozzle. If not, gently push the material and try to extrude again.

H2D.es: Retire el filamento externo del extrusor izquierdo.
H2D.en: Remove external filament from left extruder.

_all.es: Retire el filamento externo del extrusor izquierdo.
_all.en: Remove external filament from left extruder.

H2S.pt-BR: O Motor-A tem um curto-circuito. Pode ter falhado.
H2S.en: Motor-A has a short circuit. It may have failed.

_all.pt-BR: O Motor-A tem um curto-circuito. Pode ter falhado.
_all.en: Motor-A has a short circuit. It may have failed.

A1MINI.en: Unformatted SD card. Please format it.

_all.en: Unformatted SD card. Please format it.

H2S.de: Die Empfindlichkeit des Kraftsensors 1 ist zu niedrig. Die elektrische Verbindung ist vielleicht kaputt.
H2S.en: Force sensor 1 sensitivity is too low. The electrical connection may be broken.

_all.de: Die Empfindlichkeit des Kraftsensors 1 ist zu niedrig. Die elektrische Verbindung ist vielleicht kaputt.
_all.en: Force sensor 1 sensitivity is too low. The electrical connection may be broken.

H2S.en: The temperature sensor of the Laser Module may have a short circuit.

_all.en: The temperature sensor of the Laser Module may have a short circuit.

H2D.de: Das rechte Seitenfenster scheint geöffnet zu sein. Die Aufgabe wurde pausiert.
H2D.en: The right side window seems to be open. The task has been paused.

_all.de: Das rechte Seitenfenster scheint geöffnet zu sein. Die Aufgabe wurde pausiert.
_all.en: The right side window seems to be open. The task has been paused.

P1P.en: Please insert a MicroSD card and restart the print job.
P1P.es: Por favor, inserte una tarjeta SD y reinicie la impresión.

A1.es: Por favor, inserte una tarjeta SD y reinicie la impresión.
A1.en: Please insert a MicroSD card and restart the print job.

_all.en: Please insert a MicroSD card and restart the print job.
_all.es: Por favor, inserte una tarjeta SD y reinicie la impresión.
